title: To A Gentlewoman On Just Dealing.
content:
True to yourself and sheets, you'll have me swear;
    You shall, if righteous dealing I find there.
    Do not you fall through frailty; I'll be sure
    To keep my bond still free from forfeiture.
meaning:
"To A Gentlewoman On Just Dealing." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
